wikipedia tag in an outdated form for removal
wikipedia tag in outdated form (['wikipedia:en']), with wikipedia and wikidata tag present and may be safely removed
Zoo Berlin - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( way(9393789)['wikidata'='Q154828']['wikipedia'='de:Zoologischer Garten Berlin']['wikipedia:en'='Berlin Zoological Garden']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia tag in an outdated form for removal']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q48757383 vs Q22049138
Mutter mit totem Sohn - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q1578934 vs Q4251884
ehem. Motorenhöhenprüfstand, AG Supramolekulare Systeme SMS (HU) - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q32664141 vs Q907643
Bremer Höhe - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q79394905 vs Q6348487
Ludwig-Cauer-Grundschule - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q55518164 vs Q33061055
Botschaft Äthiopien - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q30193282 vs Q3145246
Krankenhaus Waldfriede - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q1567844 vs Q105045234
Tempelhofer Hafen - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(5253735916)['wikidata'='Q48757383']['wikipedia'='de:Mutter mit totem Sohn']; relation(2016227)['wikidata'='Q1578934']['wikipedia'='de:Motorenhöhenprüfstand']; way(23496417)['wikidata'='Q32664141']['wikipedia'='de:Bremer Höhe']; way(305190239)['wikidata'='Q79394905']['wikipedia'='de:Ludwig-Cauer-Grundschule']; way(31235850)['wikidata'='Q55518164']['wikipedia'='de:Äthiopische Botschaft in Berlin']; way(31284439)['wikidata'='Q30193282']['wikipedia'='de:Krankenhaus Waldfriede']; way(4663217)['wikidata'='Q1567844']['wikipedia'='de:Hafen Tempelhof']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect']
